topIssues: frame 5 & 6: Frames 5 and 6 are completely identical duplicates. This is a redundant frame artifact that should be consolidated into a single frame with a combined duration of 5100ms.

frame 5: The transition to the final merged state is shown for only 900ms before the duplicate frame 6, making the sudden appearance of the merged values (+21.7% and +22.4%) and the lock releases feel jarringly fast.
frame 1: The room trace log text at the bottom (e.g., 'click a Variance or Note cell...') has very low contrast against the dark background, making it difficult to read at standard preview sizes.
fixSuggestions: Consolidate Frame 5 and Frame 6 into a single final frame with a 5100ms display time to eliminate the duplicate frame artifact and optimize GIF file size.
Increase the contrast of the gray text in the room trace log and the 'v1/v3/v5' version badges to meet WCAG AA standards for dark mode.
Add a brief visual highlight (like a soft green flash or fade) on the newly merged cells in the final frame to guide the viewer's eye to the resolved changes.
